title: New Moon - Meeting -
overview: Seven boys with a secret attend a night school. They are strangely drawn to the transfer student Sooha.

title: Crescent Moon - The Wolves Who Climbed Over the Wall -
overview: Sooha runs into some Sunshine City School students. They suspect Heli and the boys murdered their classmate.

title: Half Moon - The Pre-emptive Date -
overview: Sooha loses Shion while out on a date with him and is confronted by vampires with sharp fangs.

title: Blood Moon - Night of the Total Eclipse -
overview: Sooha dreams of Chris, who died when they were young, and heads to the seaside.

title: Waxing Moon - Bite My Neck -
overview: The boys learn Sooha despises vampires, but Heli resolves to give a party invitation to Sooha anyway.

title: Hunter's Moon - Birthday Party -
overview: Sooha attends the boys' birthday party. Afterward, she returns to the mansion and witnesses a shocking sight.

title: Blue Moon - That's Fate -
overview: Heli and the boys find themselves in a standoff against Sooha’s childhood friend, who’s revealed to be a powerful vampire in disguise.

title: Old Moon - Vampire Lord -
overview: The day of the nightball game arrives. As an intense game plays out, a shadow sneaks up on Sooha.

title: Misty Moon - The Black Mist of Railgun -
overview: Having regained their memories from their past lives, the boys head to the Vanfield House.

title: Waning Moon - Mortal Combat in Automnal -
Hazy Moon - Vargr's Blood -
overview: Dardan faces the lycanthrope who is the final key to his ritual, and the boys head to the altar.

title: Dark Moon - The Moon Altar -
overview: The boys despair as Dardan attempts to seize everything, but their true power is awakened!
